investigator.value: Sherlock Holmes as detective, with Dr. Watson as narrator and companion

clue_fairness.value: Watson's narration provides reader access to Holmes' observations and deductions as they occur
clue_fairness.quote: Being a reprint from the reminiscences of JOHN H. WATSON, M.D.

social_world.value: Military hierarchy and colonial power structures - Army Medical Department, regimental attachments, Indian campaign
social_world.quote: I was duly attached to the Fifth Northumberland Fusiliers as Assistant Surgeon. The regiment was stationed in India

investigator_wound.value: Watson's war trauma - wounded at Maiwand, weakened by enteric fever, physical and psychological vulnerability
investigator_wound.quote: I was struck on the shoulder by a Jezail bullet, which shattered the bone and grazed the subclavian artery

_meta.title: ebook sir arthur conan doyle a study in scarlet
